metadata_controls: Renderer metadata must align with lifecycle record source references.
Artifact content must remain non-empty before downstream trial generation.
placeholder_policy_controls: When renderer metadata indicates placeholders, rendered content must visibly declare placeholder presence.
limitation_visibility_controls: When renderer metadata indicates limitations, rendered content must visibly preserve limitation statements.
standards_warning_controls: When standards warnings are indicated by metadata, rendered content must visibly preserve standards warning language.

metadata_controls: CSV summary metadata rows must align with lifecycle record source references.
CSV summary output must remain non-empty before downstream trial generation.
placeholder_policy_controls: When renderer metadata indicates placeholders, CSV summary content must visibly preserve placeholder metadata.
limitation_visibility_controls: When renderer metadata indicates limitations, CSV summary content must visibly preserve limitation metadata.
standards_warning_controls: When standards warnings are indicated by metadata, CSV summary content must visibly preserve standards warning metadata.

library_controls: M29.9 validates controlled renderer output contracts only.
M29.9 does not generate trial document sets, create UAT acceptance, approve records, sign records, release records, deploy outputs, productize outputs, or create SaaS readiness.
Output validation must preserve visible placeholders, limitations, standards warnings, and lifecycle source truth.
